meta.title: Ember & Oak — Upscale Casual Dining
meta.description: An intimate dining experience featuring artfully crafted cuisine with warm amber tones and a moody, welcoming atmosphere.

hero.label: Est. 2019
hero.title: Where Every Meal Tells a Story
hero.subtext: Artfully crafted cuisine in an intimate, atmospheric setting

home.title: Ember & Oak — Upscale Casual Dining
home.description: Artfully crafted cuisine in a warm, intimate atmosphere. Reserve your table tonight.

sections.label: From the Kitchen
sections.heading: Signature Dishes
sections.subheading: Each plate is composed with seasonal ingredients and meticulous attention to craft

items.title: Dry-Aged Ribeye
items.text: 45-day dry-aged prime ribeye with bone marrow butter, truffle jus, and a potato galette. The crown jewel of our menu.

items.title: Wild Halibut
items.text: Pan-seared Pacific halibut over saffron beurre blanc with spring pea purée and crispy capers. Delicate and precise.

items.title: Wild Mushroom Risotto
items.text: Slow-cooked arborio with a forest mushroom medley, aged parmesan, and a kiss of truffle oil. A vegetarian masterpiece.

items.title: Chocolate Fondant
items.text: Warm Valrhona dark chocolate fondant with a salted caramel molten core, served alongside Tahitian vanilla gelato.

items.quote: The atmosphere alone is worth the visit — but the food elevates it to something truly special. The ribeye was flawless.
items.author: Margaret T.

items.quote: We celebrated our anniversary here and it was perfect from start to finish. The chef's table experience is an absolute must.
items.author: James & Clara W.

items.quote: Intimate, warm, and impeccably staffed. The wine pairing dinner was the highlight of our trip to the city.
items.author: David K.

chef.label: Meet the Chef
chef.heading: A Culinary Vision
chef.bio: Chef Marco Vitale brings over two decades of passion and precision to every dish, drawing inspiration from classical French technique, Italian heritage, and bold global flavors discovered through years of travel.
chef.bio2: Every plate is a personal statement — a commitment to honest ingredients elevated by artistry and deep respect for the craft.
chef.name: Chef Marco Vitale

events.label: Special Occasions
events.heading: Upcoming Events
events.subheading: Join us for exclusive dining experiences and seasonal celebrations

items.title: Wine Pairing Dinner
items.desc: A curated five-course journey with sommelier-selected wines from boutique vineyards.

items.title: Chef's Table Evening
items.desc: An exclusive eight-seat tasting menu cooked and presented personally by our head chef.

items.title: Jazz & Tapas Night
items.desc: Live jazz quartet sets the mood for an evening of shareable small plates and craft cocktails.

catering.label: Private Events
catering.heading: Catering & Private Dining
catering.desc: Whether it's an intimate gathering or a grand celebration, our catering team brings the full Ember & Oak experience to your venue — with the same dedication to quality, craft, and warm hospitality.

reservation.label: Visit Us
reservation.heading: Join Us for an Unforgettable Evening
reservation.subtext: We recommend reservations, especially on weekends. Walk-ins are always welcome based on availability.

menu.title: Menu — Ember & Oak
menu.description: Explore our seasonal menu of artfully crafted starters, mains, desserts, and handcrafted cocktails.
menu.label: Our Offerings
menu.subtitle: Seasonal ingredients. Timeless technique.
menu.notice: Menu changes seasonally. Please inform your server of any dietary requirements or allergies. Consuming raw or undercooked items may increase your risk of foodborne illness.

starters.name: Burrata & Heirloom Tomato
starters.desc: Creamy burrata, charred heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, sea salt, grilled sourdough

starters.name: Scallop Crudo
starters.desc: Thinly sliced dry-packed scallops, yuzu kosho, pickled cucumber, micro cilantro

starters.name: Duck Liver Parfait
starters.desc: Smooth duck liver parfait, sour cherry jam, toasted brioche, cornichons

starters.name: Roasted Beet Salad
starters.desc: Gold & red beets, whipped ricotta, candied walnuts, sherry vinaigrette, fresh herbs

mains.name: Dry-Aged Ribeye
mains.desc: 14oz 45-day dry-aged ribeye, bone marrow butter, truffle jus, roasted potato galette

mains.name: Pan-Seared Halibut
mains.desc: Wild halibut, saffron beurre blanc, spring pea purée, crispy capers, lemon zest

mains.name: Heritage Pork Chop
mains.desc: Bone-in Berkshire pork, apple & fennel mostarda, grilled radicchio, polenta cake

mains.name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
mains.desc: Arborio rice, forest mushroom medley, aged parmesan, truffle oil, fresh thyme

desserts.name: Valrhona Chocolate Fondant
desserts.desc: Warm dark chocolate fondant, salted caramel core, Tahitian vanilla gelato

desserts.name: Crème Brûlée
desserts.desc: Classic vanilla custard, caramelized sugar crust, fresh raspberries, mint

desserts.name: Seasonal Tart
desserts.desc: Buttery shortcrust, seasonal fruit compote, mascarpone cream, toasted almonds

drinks.name: Ember Old Fashioned
drinks.desc: Smoke-infused bourbon, black walnut bitters, orange peel, charred oak

drinks.name: Saffron Negroni
drinks.desc: Saffron-infused gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, orange bitters

drinks.name: Curated Wine List
drinks.desc: Old and new world selections. Ask your server for tonight's by-the-glass offerings.

contact.title: Contact — Ember & Oak
contact.description: Get in touch with Ember & Oak for general inquiries, private dining, and catering.
contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for general inquiries or to ask about private events.
contact.privateText: Interested in hosting a private dinner, corporate event, or special celebration? Our events team is here to create a bespoke experience for you.

contact.heading: Send Us a Message
contact.subheading: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

form.thankYouMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
form.thankYouSubtext: Check your email for a confirmation message.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please call us directly or try again.

footer.about: An intimate dining experience where craft, warmth, and seasonal flavors come together in every plate.
